stories.title: Valero Texas Open — Bhatia Leads, Fowler Misses Masters

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Rickie Fowler missed the cut at the Valero.

Masters dream over for 2026. 💔

Akshay Bhatia leads. Tony Finau is still alive.

The last Augusta invite is up for grabs Sunday. ⛳

#GolfFanrecap #ValeroTexasOpen #Masters

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Fowler. No Masters. Again.

He's a beloved player with a ranking that keeps him out of Augusta.

The door isn't closed forever — but Sunday confirmed it's shut for 2026.

Bhatia leads. Final round tomorrow. 👀

#GolfFanrecap #Fowler #Masters2026

article.headline: Bhatia Leads Valero, Fowler Misses Cut — Last Masters Invite Up for Grabs Sunday

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
5 days until the Masters. ⛳

Scheffler: +550 (3-peat bid)
McIlroy: +1100 (defending, back-to-back bid)
DeChambeau: +1000 (back-to-back LIV wins)

90th Masters. $21M purse. Amazon Prime debut.

April 9 at Augusta National. 🌸

#GolfFanrecap #Masters2026 #Augusta

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
No Tiger. No Phil.

But Scheffler, McIlroy, DeChambeau, Rahm, Fleetwood — the best field in years.

5 days until the Masters begins at Augusta National. 🌸

Who wins it? 👇

#GolfFanrecap #Masters2026 #Augusta

stories.title: LPGA Aramco Championship — Lexi Coughlin Leads in Las Vegas

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
LPGA Aramco final round:

Lexi Coughlin leads at -8 👀
Hyo Joo Kim and Nelly Korda at -2.

Kim chasing her THIRD straight win.
Korda hunting a big one before the Chevron.

Shadow Creek Sunday. ⛳

#GolfFanrecap #LPGAAramco #LPGA

stories.title: Rickie Fowler Misses Masters Again — 5th Time in 6 Years

x_posts.label: Post 4-1
x_posts.text:
Rickie Fowler missed the Valero cut.

That means no Masters invitation. Again.

A beloved player. A ranking that keeps slipping away from Augusta.

There are no easy paths back. Sunday confirmed that for 2026. 💔

#GolfFanrecap #Fowler #Masters2026

x_posts.label: Post 4-2
x_posts.text:
Golf fans have watched Rickie Fowler miss Augusta multiple times.

The Valero was his last realistic shot. He shot 75 in Round 2.

Every year without a Masters feels like unfinished business.

Hoping his form turns around before 2027. ⛳

#GolfFanrecap #Fowler #Augusta

article.headline: Rickie Fowler Misses the Masters Again — No Augusta in 2026

stories.title: DeChambeau Enters Masters on Back-to-Back LIV Wins

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Bryson DeChambeau enters the Masters with back-to-back LIV wins.

Defeated Rahm in a playoff in South Africa.

His odds for Augusta: +1000.

He was the 2021 RUNNER-UP. He knows this course. 👀🔥

#GolfFanrecap #DeChambeau #Masters2026

stories.title: Jordan Spieth Reveals Scheffler's "Unusual" Competitive Edge

x_posts.label: Post 6-1
x_posts.text:
Spieth on what makes Scheffler unbeatable at Augusta:

"Relentless competitive drive — and a genuine indifference to winning's perks."

Skipped Houston Open for his wife's baby. Comes back as +550 favorite. ⛳🔥

#GolfFanrecap #Scheffler #Masters2026

x_posts.label: Post 6-2
x_posts.text:
Scheffler won the Masters in 2022. Won it in 2024.

5 days from now, he goes for three.

That would be historically extraordinary.

The man just went home for his baby's birth and comes back as +550 favorite.

This guy is something else. 🏆

#GolfFanrecap #Scheffler #Augusta

article.headline: Spieth Says Scheffler's Augusta Edge Is "Unusual" — And He's Right

stories.title: Masters Field Set — Notable Absences and New Faces

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Masters 2026 field: 91 players.

No Tiger. No Phil.

22 debutants. 11 LIV golfers. $21M purse.

The Valero winner gets the last invite Sunday.

Par 3 Contest: April 8.
Round 1: April 9. 🌸

#GolfFanrecap #Masters2026 #Augusta
